# Design System: Clean Shopper
**Version:** 2.0
**Last Updated:** 2026-04-11
**Source:** Generated by /design-system-generator skill from brand interview

---

## How to Use This Document
This file is referenced by CLAUDE.md and read by Claude Code at the start of every session. Apply these tokens for all UI work. Do not hardcode hex values, pixel sizes, or spacing values in components. Reference token names from tailwind.config.js instead.

---

## Brand Direction
Clean Shopper feels like a California farmers market that got a modern rebrand — crisp, confident, and a little punchy. The visual language is built on high contrast: deep forest green anchors the identity with authority and trust, electric chartreuse and warm orange inject California sunshine and energy, and white does the heavy lifting as the dominant surface. Think Headspace's calm structure and Instacart's utility, but bolder and more editorial. Generous whitespace, sharp type, and color that earns its place.

---

## Color System

### Primary Colors
| Token Name | Hex Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| primary | #1B3829 | Primary buttons, active navigation states, key CTAs, the NavBar brand name. The single most important interactive element per view. Not used for decorative fills, backgrounds, or secondary actions. |
| primary-light | #2D5A3E | Hover states on primary elements, selected states on filter chips, active icon fills. |
| primary-dark | #0F2119 | Pressed states on primary buttons, focus rings, high-emphasis text links on white. |

### Accent Colors
| Token Name | Hex Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| accent | #D4F53C | Highlight moments, promotional callouts, active state backgrounds in dark contexts, energy accents on the primary green surface. Never used as text color on white backgrounds — contrast is insufficient. |
| accent-dark | #BADA2C | Hover state for accent elements in dark contexts. |

### Secondary Colors
| Token Name | Hex Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| secondary | #F47820 | Warm emphasis: highlights, secondary badges, ingredient callout accents. Use sparingly — one accent element per card maximum. Not used for primary actions or semantic states. |
| secondary-dark | #D4650F | Hover state for secondary interactive elements. |

### Semantic Colors
| Token Name | Hex Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| success | #16A34A | Clean product ratings, confirmed saves, positive ingredient assessments. Not used for decorative green elements or brand color. |
| warning | #D97706 | Caution-level ingredient ratings, partial match alerts, items needing attention. Not used for brand accents. |
| error | #DC2626 | Error states, avoid ingredient ratings, destructive action confirmations. Not used for accent or decorative purposes. |

### Neutral Colors
| Token Name | Hex Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| neutral-50 | #FFFFFF | Page background. Pure white — the dominant surface. Maximises contrast against primary green and accent. |
| neutral-100 | #F5F5F0 | Card backgrounds, modal surfaces, input field fills. Slight warmth to prevent sterility. |
| neutral-200 | #E2E2DA | Borders, dividers, input outlines at rest, skeleton loader fills. |
| neutral-400 | #98988E | Placeholder text, disabled input text, inactive icon fills. |
| neutral-600 | #464640 | Secondary body text, supporting copy, metadata. High contrast on white — meets WCAG AA. |
| neutral-900 | #121210 | Primary text, headings, high-emphasis labels. Near-black for maximum contrast. Never use pure black (#000000). |

---

## Typography

**Font Family:** Plus Jakarta Sans — sharp, contemporary, and unapologetically modern. Wide weight range (200–800) lets headings punch hard while body copy stays clean and readable. California tech-meets-farmers-market energy.
**Source:** Google Fonts

### Type Scale
| Token Name | Size | Weight | Line Height | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| display | 56px | 800 | 1.05 | Hero headlines, empty state headings, marketing moments. One per page maximum. Maximum impact — pair with white space. |
| h1 | 40px | 700 | 1.15 | Page titles. One per view. |
| h2 | 28px | 700 | 1.25 | Section headers, major content groupings. |
| h3 | 20px | 600 | 1.35 | Card titles, subsection headers, modal titles. |
| h4 | 16px | 600 | 1.4 | Field group labels, small section headers, ingredient category names. |
| body | 16px | 400 | 1.6 | All body copy, descriptions, ingredient lists, product details. Default text size. |
| small | 14px | 400 | 1.5 | Supporting text, metadata, tags, secondary labels, timestamps. |
| micro | 12px | 400 | 1.4 | Legal text, fine print, source attribution, minimal UI chrome. |

---

## Spacing Scale

Base unit: 4px

| Token Name | Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| space-xs | 4px | Icon-to-label gap, tight internal chip padding, badge padding. |
| space-sm | 8px | Compact padding within small components like tags, badges, and icon buttons. |
| space-md | 16px | Standard internal padding for inputs, buttons, and list items. |
| space-lg | 24px | Card internal padding, form field spacing, content group padding. |
| space-xl | 32px | Gap between cards in a grid, space between a heading and its content. |
| space-2xl | 48px | Between major content sections on a page. |
| space-3xl | 64px | Page-level top/bottom margins, large section gaps. |
| space-4xl | 96px | Hero section padding, full-bleed section vertical spacing. |

---

## Border Radius

| Token Name | Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| radius-sm | 4px | Tags, badges, small chips — crisp and tight, not bubbly. |
| radius-md | 8px | Input fields, buttons, small cards. |
| radius-lg | 16px | Product cards, modals, drawers, larger containers. |
| radius-full | 9999px | Pills, avatar images, fully rounded icon buttons. |

---

## Shadows

| Token Name | Value | Usage Rule |
|---|---|---|
| shadow-sm | 0 1px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08) | Resting card state, subtle surface lift on white. Default for all cards. |
| shadow-md | 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12) | Hover state on interactive cards, dropdown menus, popovers. |
| shadow-lg | 0 12px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.16) | Modals, overlays, focused drawer panels. |

---

## Usage Rules Summary

These rules apply to every component Claude Code builds for this project:

1. Never hardcode a hex value. Use the token name from tailwind.config.js.
2. Never hardcode a pixel font size. Use the type scale token classes.
3. Never hardcode spacing. Use the spacing scale token classes.
4. Primary (#1B3829) is for the single most important interactive element per view. Not for decoration, background fills, or secondary actions.
5. neutral-900 for primary text. neutral-600 for secondary text. Never use pure black (#000000).
6. Semantic colors carry meaning. Do not use success green for anything other than positive ingredient or product states.
7. Accent (#D4F53C) is high-energy — use it purposefully, never decoratively. It does not have sufficient contrast for text on white backgrounds.
8. White (neutral-50) is the dominant surface. Let it breathe. Use space-xl or larger between distinct content sections.
9. All body text on neutral-50 or neutral-100 backgrounds must meet WCAG AA contrast ratio (4.5:1).
